name: Fusilli with Lentil Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions, garlic, and carrots; cook until softened.
2. Stir in lentils, broth, rosemary, and thyme. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 15 minutes.
3. Stir in tomatoes; continue simmering, uncovered, for 15-20 more minutes or until lentils are tender.
4. Add spinach and cook until just wilted, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Cook pasta according to package directions until al dente. Drain and toss with the sauce. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese before serving.
